CVE-2022-41409.title: Integer overflow vulnerability in pcre2test before 10.41 allows a ...
CVE-2022-41409.description: Integer overflow vulnerability in pcre2test before 10.41 allows attackers to cause a denial of service or other unspecified impacts via negative input.
CVE-2022-41409.notes: The installed package version includes the fixes for this vulnerability. If this vulnerability is reported by a scanning tool, it is a false positive.
